zh.lifeSummary: 當Guglielmo II Stendardo於1240年出生在法國時，他的父親Guglielmo I Stendardo de Beynes27歲，母親Mabille de Montmorency-Marly25歲。他於1274年9月15日之前與Isabella d'Aquino結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1308年6月在義大利坎帕尼亞拿坡里享年68歲，埋葬在義大利坎帕尼亞拿坡里拿坡里。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guglielmo II Stendardo于1240年出生在法国时，他的父亲Guglielmo I Stendardo de Beynes27岁，母亲Mabille de Montmorency-Marly25岁。他于1274年9月15日之前与Isabella d'Aquino结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1308年6月在意大利坎帕尼亞拿坡里享年68岁，埋葬在意大利坎帕尼亞拿坡里拿坡里。

nameMeanings.name: Guglielmo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Guglielmo II Stendardo was born in 1240, in France, his father, Guglielmo I Stendardo de Beynes, was 27 and his mother, Mabille de Montmorency-Marly, was 25. He married Isabella d'Aquino before 15 September 1274. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in June 1308, in Naples, Campania, Italy, at the age of 68, and was buried in Naples, Naples, Campania, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guglielmo II Stendardo est né en 1240, à France, son père, Guglielmo I Stendardo de Beynes, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mabille de Montmorency-Marly, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Isabella d'Aquino avant 15 septembre 1274. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en juin 1308, à Napoli, Campania, Italie, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Napoli, Napoli, Campania, Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guglielmo II Stendardo 1240 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guglielmo I Stendardo de Beynes 27 und seine Mutter Mabille de Montmorency-Marly 25. Er hat vor 15. September 1274 Isabella d'Aquino geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb im Juni 1308 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Napoli, Campania, Italien und wurde in Neapel, Napoli, Campania, Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guglielmo II Stendardo è nato il nel 1240 nel Francia, il suo padre, Guglielmo I Stendardo de Beynes, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Mabille de Montmorency-Marly, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Isabella d'Aquino prima del 15 settembre 1274. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel giugno 1308, nel Napoli, Campania, Italia, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Napoli, Napoli, Campania, Italia.

ko.Giugliano in Campania, Napoli, Campania,: 이탈리아 캠파니아 나폴리 주그리아노 인 캠파니아
ko.lifeSummary: Guglielmo II Stendardo(이)가 1240년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guglielmo I Stendardo de Beynes(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Mabille de Montmorency-Marly(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1274년 9월 15일 이전 Isabella d'Aquino(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1308년 6월 이탈리아 캠파니아 나폴리에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 캠파니아 나폴리 나폴리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guglielmo II Stendardo nasceu em 1240, em França, seu pai, Guglielmo I Stendardo de Beynes, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Mabille de Montmorency-Marly, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabella d'Aquino antes 15 de setembro de 1274. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em junho de 1308, em Napoli, Campania, Itália, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Napoli, Napoli, Campania, Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guglielmo II Stendardo родился в 1240 г. в местности Франция, его отцу по имени Guglielmo I Stendardo de Beynes было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mabille de Montmorency-Marly, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella d'Aquino перед 15 сентябрь 1274 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер июнь 1308 г. в местности наполи, кампаня, Италия в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности наполи, наполи, кампаня, Италия.
